nasa_api_key.title: NASA API Key
nasa_api_key.description: Free key from api.nasa.gov. Leave blank to use DEMO_KEY (rate-limited to ~30 req/hr).

collections.title: Collections
collections.description: Which NASA image sources to draw from. FramePilot picks randomly across your selection each rotation.

image_library_query.title: Image Library keyword
image_library_query.description: Search term for NASA Image Library and JWST queries (e.g. 'nebula', 'galaxy', 'earth', 'aurora').

prefer_hd.title: Prefer HD images
prefer_hd.description: Use the highest-resolution version available. Recommended for 4K displays.

max_age_days.title: Max APOD age (days)
max_age_days.description: For APOD: only pick images published within this many days. Set to 0 for no limit.
